api_key.description: CommCare HQ API key. Sent as an ApiKey-scheme Authorization header (Authorization: ApiKey <api_key>); never logged.

project_space.description: CommCare HQ project space slug; substituted into project-scoped API paths.

app_id.description: Optional CommCare application id; used by application detail, multimedia status, and as a form/case filter where supported.

processing_id.description: Application multimedia upload processing id for polling upload status.

form_id.description: Form submission id for form detail endpoints.

case_id.description: Case id for case detail, child-index, and case update endpoints.

case_ids.description: Comma-separated case ids for the Case Data API v2 GET bulk-by-id endpoint.

external_id.description: External id for Case Data API v2 external-id lookups and upserts.

mobile_worker_id.description: Mobile worker id for user detail and mutation endpoints.

web_user_id.description: Web user id for web-user detail and mutation endpoints.

group_id.description: Group id for group detail and mutation endpoints.

report_id.description: Report id for the configurable report data endpoint.

location_id.description: Location id for Location API v1/v2 detail and update endpoints.

location_type_id.description: Location type id for location type detail endpoints.

fixture_item_id.description: Fixture item id for the legacy fixture item endpoint.

fixture_type.description: Fixture table name for filtering legacy fixture items.

lookup_table_id.description: Lookup table id for update and delete actions.

lookup_table_item_id.description: Lookup table row id for update and delete actions.

base_url.description: CommCare HQ base URL override for self-hosted instances, tests, or proxies.
